layout_and_spacing.container: App MUST be constrained within a max-w-md mx-auto container to simulate a mobile app interface on desktop, filling 100vh.
layout_and_spacing.padding_rules: Always use p-6 for internal card padding to prevent collision.

surfaces.cards: Neumorphism (Tactile). 1px solid border (border-white/10). Background matches parent (#121212).
surfaces.header: Glassmorphism: bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10. Sticky top.
surfaces.preview_panel: Flat background with dynamic Box Shadow (Glow) to reflect the combined RGBWW color output in real-time.
surfaces.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom, Glassmorphism base with high-contrast active tab indicator.

sliders.instructions: Increase touch target height (h-10 minimum wrapper). Use tactile slider thumbs (w-6 h-6, rounded-full, border-2 border-white). The track fill MUST match the channel color (Red for Red channel, etc.). Background track is dark grey.

buttons.styles: Sharp 8px border-radius max. High contrast text. Use 1px border. Hover: translate-y-[-1px] with subtle ambient shadow.

tabs.styles: Full width layout for sections. Selected tab must have high-contrast background, unselected must be muted.

color_wheel_replacement.instructions: Instead of a standard color wheel, stack 5 distinct horizontal sliders with generous vertical spacing (gap-6). Each slider requires a monospace value readout (0-100%) on the right side.

animations.interactions: Sliders should instantly update the top preview panel color without lag.
animations.loading: Use simple tactical spinning borders (Tracing Beam style) for Bluetooth connecting state.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for labels. Slider values must be pure white over dark tracks.
accessibility.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid on all sliders, preset buttons, tab triggers, and the connect button.

icons.instructions: Use minimalist icons, 1.5px stroke width. (Bluetooth, SlidersHorizontal, Star, Clock, Settings)

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI inside a max-w-md mx-auto container to feel like a native app on desktop browsers.
Implement Web Bluetooth API (navigator.bluetooth) to handle the SP630E connection, including the custom UUIDs for this controller.
Create 5 separate state variables (0-100%) for R, G, B, W1, W2 channels.
Build the 'Color Preview' box at the top that dynamically combines the RGB values into a background-color, and adds a brightness/glow based on W1/W2 intensity.
Implement a preset system allowing saving/loading/deleting states using localStorage.
Include timer/automation mockups or real implementations if backend is provided.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
